title: GUI Revision+ Dark
description: A dark mode texture pack inspired by GUI revision.
body:
### Credits

This project is inspired by [@Vixel](https://modrinth.com/user/Vixel)'s excellent resource pack [Gui Revision](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision).

### What does it add?

- GUI for almost all in-game containers

- A nice dark mode design


### Supported Mods
- [Fabric-API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui)
- [Overflowingbars](https://modrinth.com/mod/overflowing-bars)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)

| Texture | Exists | Optigui |
|---------|--------|----------|
| Anvil | ✅ | ❌ |
| Beacon | ✅ | ❌ |
| Blast Furnace | ✅ | ❌ |
| Brewing Stand | ✅ | ❌ |
| Cartography Table | ✅ | ❌ |
| Chest | ✅ | ❌ |
| Crafter | ✅ | ❌
| Crafting Table | ✅ | ❌ |
| Creative Invenotry | ✅ | ❌ |
| Dispenser | ❌ | ❌ |
| Dropper | ❌ | ❌ |
| Enchanting Table | ✅ | ❌ |
| Furnace | ✅ | ❌ |
| Grindstone | ✅ | ❌ |
| Hopper | ✅ | ❌ |
| Inventory | ✅ | ❌ |
| Loom | ✅ | ❌ |
| Minecart with Hopper | ✅ | ❌ |
| Recipe Book | ✅ | ❌ |
| Shulker Box | ✅ | ❌ |
| Smithing Table | ✅ | ❌ |
| Smoker | ✅ | ❌ |

| Barrel | ✅ | ✅ |
| Colored Shulker Boxes | ✅ | ✅ |
| Copper Chest  | ✅ | ✅ |
| Copper Chest variants | ✅ | ✅ |
| Ender Chest | ✅ | ✅ |
| Mounts | ✅ | ✅ |
| Minecart with Chest | ❌ | ✅ |
| Trapped Chest | ✅ | ✅ |
| Villager Variants | ✅ | ✅ |

<summary>Terms of use</summary>
Author: CrimsonFlames

**When you can use my asset:**

In modpacks on curseforge, modrinth

Any private modifications of the original resource pack.

Making a youtube video on it

**When you cannot use:**

Locking behind a paywall

Distribution of original assets on any platforms.

**Links:**
